{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323043243E3A1F7BA59B8AD7BE812"}"},"total":13},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7323446446031684403","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好的文，独立又上下连接。和作家李猛一样风格，李猛文更暗黑、恐怖。有几个故事的结局没写完，不算完结，想看到结尾。
最近看的文里本书作者是比较出众的一位，小众不随大流，我喜欢你（づ￣3￣）づ╭❤～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705124046,"group_id":"7262156902417566772","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有越不过的山，只有你数不清的执念","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5wuNVc0pgWWEfyYCs4yuu9vXC1XUKUbNtGrkvo+yTcM","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4c895ecb6b35425089bcbfda702ecd2c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793432&x-signature=NEvVzfkPQVUcB54Bmh64O%2FTAPT4%3D","user_id":"3536464696312077","user_name":"钟情杨枭~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3536464696312077","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704418374,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7262156902417566772","book_info":{"abstract":"番茄原创 悬疑脑洞 灵异惊悚
【恐怖惊悚+黑暗文风】
【诡异短篇合集，恐惧复苏，克苏鲁】
【来自未知存在的凝视，善良或邪恶在于人心】
在生活中，你是否也有不寒而栗的瞬间。是在半夜行走听到的猫叫声，还是楼上地板传来打弹珠的声音，亦或是眼尾不经意瞥见的黑影......

故事一：猫
情节简介：学校发生自杀事件，同学李然告诉我猫能辟邪。而我最讨厌猫，小时因与猫争宠，脚被烫伤。父母带我住院也无法根治，就在我以为要截掉的时候，外婆来了。她带了神秘的偏方......
故事二：痒
情节简介：凌娅是我舍友，但是她很奇怪。自从她来到宿舍后，晚上我总是莫名其妙就睡着了。一日，我没有吃她给的东西。半夜，从浴室传来她痛苦又快乐的叫声......
